versions.version_description: Simple chords in the original key.

tuning: D G C F A D
content:
Tune your guitar down a full step down from standard (EADGBE) to (DGCFAD)

For my own sanity I'll write the chord shapes as if it's still in standard, relative to how the shape 
would be when it's being played with no capo. But in reality the chords were transposed -2.


[tab][Intro Bassline]
    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
D|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
A|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
F|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
C|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
G|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
D|--3-5-5--5-5-5--7-7-7-7--8-8--8--8-8-8--10-10-12-12--1-1--1--1-1--1--1-1--3-3--3--3-0--0--0-0---|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
It can't be said I'm an early bird[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]
It's ten o'clock before I say a word[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, I can never tell[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
How do you sleep so well?[/tab]

(You can start strumming here)

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
You keep telling me to live right[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
To go to bed before the daylight[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]F[/ch]
But then you wake up for the sunrise[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
You know you don't gotta pretend[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Baby, now and then[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]
Don't you just wanna wake up[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
Dark as a lake[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Smelling like a bonfire[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Lost in a haze?[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
If you're drunk on life, babe[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
I think it's great[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
But while in this world[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E7[/ch]
I think I'll take my whiskey[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
Neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I take my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]


[Instrumental bassline]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I aim low[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
I aim true, and the ground's where I go[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]F[/ch]
I work late where I'm free from the phone[/tab]
                  
And the job gets done
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
But you worry some, I know[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
But who wants to live forever, babe[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C[/ch]
You treat your mouth as if it's Heaven's gate[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F[/ch]
The rest of you like you're the TSA[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
I wish that I could go along[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E7[/ch]
Babe, don't get me wrong[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
You know you're bright as the morning[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
As soft as the rain[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Pretty as a vine[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
As sweet as a grape[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
If you can sit in a barrel[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Maybe I'll wait[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Until that day[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
I'd rather take my whiskey[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]

I take my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]

Oh-oh-oh Oh-oh[/tab]
